name: mnemo
description: Persistent memory layer for Claude Code via Obsidian — 8 skills for vault health, knowledge search, connection discovery, session continuity, memory routing, inbox triage, skill-aware session review, and interactive setup. MCP-first hybrid (shell-safe writes), tiered models (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus), parallel CLI calls, SessionStart prewarm, claude-mem v12.3.9 integration with version-tagged observations. Any taxonomy.
